items.title: Gần 20 năm sống trong bụi đá
items.summary: Nhà cửa, vườn tược của hơn 200 hộ dân ở xã Trường Sơn thường xuyên nhuốm bụi từ mỏ đá, nhà quét được nửa tiếng lại phủ đầy bụi.

items.title: Ông Trump nêu ý tưởng đọc thỏa thuận với Iran trước báo giới
items.summary: Ông Trump cam kết công bố nội dung thỏa thuận với Iran trong vài ngày tới và nêu khả năng đọc "từng từ một" văn kiện này trước báo giới.

items.title: Fed Chair Warsh expected to withhold 'dot' from central bank's interest rate outlook
items.summary: The central bank's Federal Open Market Committee is set to release its quarterly update of where individual officials expect interest rates to head.

items.title: Michael Burry says he's tempted to bet against SpaceX, but passes on expensive options
items.summary: Burry argued the company's market capitalization had reached levels that dwarf many established businesses and fortunes.

items.title: Bill limiting investors from buying homes set to speed through Congress
items.summary: Top lawmakers reached an agreement on a key housing bill that would limit investor ownership, clearing the way for passage through both chambers of Congress.

items.title: Intel begins production of most-advanced chip, inching closer to possible Apple deal
items.summary: Intel is entering production of 18A-P, its most-advanced chip node that could be the target of a coming deal with Apple

items.title: Technical factors are adding fuel to SpaceX's meme stock fire
items.summary: Options, leveraged ETFs and index arbitrage are likely boosting the stock ahead of its inclusion in some benchmark stock indexes.

items.title: How Roku fits into Fox's future – and what investors are missing about the deal
items.summary: Fox's stock dropped following its announcement that it will acquire Roku for $22 billion. Analysts still think it's a good deal.

items.title: DOJ assists Musk's xAI in NAACP air pollution suit, asks court to toss case
items.summary: The DOJ is asking a Mississippi federal court to dismiss a lawsuit filed by the NAACP against Elon Musk's xAI, now owned by SpaceX.

items.title: Snap unveils $2,195 AR glasses as CEO Evan Spiegel bets on post-smartphone future
items.summary: Snap is launching its first AR glasses geared toward the broader public instead of developers.

items.title: Veteran traders stunned as SpaceX fans bet on 80% overnight gains: 'I've never seen anything like it'
items.summary: Believers in Elon Musk's astronomic vision for SpaceX are storming options.

items.title: Xây trung tâm dữ liệu từ 2.000 điện thoại cũ, giảm 50% phát thải carbon
items.summary: Đại học California San Diego (Mỹ) tái sử dụng điện thoại cũ làm trung tâm dữ liệu, với chi phí cùng lượng phát thải giảm một nửa so với máy chủ cấu hình trung bình của Asus.

items.title: Bạn có nhận ra bẫy tăng giá?
items.summary: Bẫy tăng giá khiến không ít nhà đầu tư mua đúng lúc thị trường bật tăng rồi nhanh chóng thua lỗ sau đó.

items.title: SpaceX valuation balloons to $2.6T, briefly passes Amazon
items.summary: SpaceX's valuation has increased by $1 trillion since its shares started trading on Friday.

items.title: Qualcomm wants to be the chip inside whatever replaces your smartphone, and it just announced two products toward that end
items.summary: Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon said Tuesday that the company is working on over 40 different AI wearable devices — including jewelry, earbuds with cameras, pins, and watches — a sign of how aggressively the chipmaker is betting that the next major computing platform won't be a phone.

items.title: Bug in FIFA World Cup internal system gave anyone ability to modify TV stream
items.summary: A security researcher said a flaw in FIFA’s online platforms allowed her to access several internal systems, including one that could have allowed her to take control of the TV stream of every World Cup match.

items.title: Android 17 launches with new multitasking tools as Google expands Gemini features
items.summary: Google has released Android 17 and Wear OS 7, introducing new multitasking features, parental controls, security tools, and smartwatch upgrades. The launch is also accompanied by a Pixel Drop that brings Google’s latest AI models to its devices.

items.title: Mobileye’s US robotaxi launch will put it on both sides of the AV business
items.summary: Mobileye apparently wants to own some of the robotaxi market, even if that puts it in direct competition with companies it supplies its self-driving system to.

items.title: Rivian cuts hundreds of workers after R2 deliveries start
items.summary: The company said the cuts were part of a restructuring meant to help scale to profitability. Rivian recently pushed back its profitability goal to invest in autonomy.

items.title: Snap finally debuts its long-awaited AR glasses, Specs, and, oof, they aren’t cheap
items.summary: For over a decade now, Snap has been working on this device. Now the glasses are finally here. So what stands out on first impression?

items.title: Sixty percent of US consumers say ‘AI’ in brand messaging is a turnoff, survey finds
items.summary: WordPress VIP’s latest survey suggests consumers are wary of AI-generated answers even as companies increasingly view AI search as an important referral channel.

items.title: SpaceX's blistering start still faces key tests that will determine the stock's true value
items.summary: SpaceX's stock has yet to face true price discovery.
